positive: A kawaii-style illustration of a sleepy, smiling sloth hanging from a jungle vine, surrounded by tiny floating hearts and tropical leaves. The style should be soft, pastel, and highly adorable, suitable for a children's brand. Vector art, clean edges, whimsical.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, realistic, harsh shadows
